title: calawaya caulina
intro: Calawaya caulina, also known as Andean mint or calawaya, is a plant native to the Andean regions of South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of calawaya caulina include relief from digestive issues, reduced fever, and improved respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
